goal: 补录 PR #1 的 Mainline intent：docs add resume opening guidance

summary.title: 补录 PR #1 resume 打开指南
summary.what: 为已合并的 fork PR #1 补录 Mainline intent。该 PR 在 Agent Capsule skill 中新增 Open Or Resume Result 指南，说明用户要求打开、继续或 resume capsule 结果时，应优先使用当前 agent surface 的 native app/thread tools；在 CLI/TUI 中避免在当前会话内嵌套执行 resume；不确定 GUI surface 时打印准确命令或询问用户。
summary.why: PR #1 合并时 fork 侧没有发布 Mainline actor log，自动 fork PR import 没有可导入的 metadata；用户直接合并后要求补一条 Mainline intent，以便这次 contributor 文档变更在 Mainline 视图里有对应解释。
summary.user_goal: 补录 PR #1 的 Mainline intent：docs add resume opening guidance

decisions.chose: 绑定 contributor 实际提交 0c8ebf1f5c308475f7f7aa77ad18b0b7017e1041，而不是 merge commit d5e5dde。
decisions.rationale: merge commit 标题匹配本仓库 Mainline skip pattern `^Merge pull request `；真正承载文档内容的是 contributor commit。

decisions.chose: 只记录 PR #1 对 skills/agent-capsule/SKILL.md 的 Open Or Resume Result 指南变更。
decisions.rationale: seal prepare 在 backfill 分支上看到了一段更宽的 main 历史 diff，但这些文件属于其他已存在提交，不属于这条 contributor PR。

decisions.chose: 用 maintainer backfill 补 intent，而不是等待 fork PR import。
decisions.rationale: fork remote 未发现 refs/mainline 或 refs/notes/mainline，说明 contributor 没有 publish 可导入的 actor log。

review_notes: Merged at 2026-06-13T05:38:26Z with merge commit d5e5dded2c356c4541918689389d8889dae820de.
Pre-merge triage found the PR mergeable and docs-only; local git merge-tree could auto-merge and git diff --check passed.
CI did not actually run before merge because the fork pull_request run was action_required.
Fork remote had no refs/mainline/* or refs/notes/mainline/*, so the new fork PR import workflow had no actor log to import.

architectural_claims: Agent Capsule skill guidance now treats opening/resuming capsule results as a surface-selection problem across app thread tools, terminal automation, and headless contexts.
behavioral_changes: Agents following the skill should prefer native app/thread tools when available for continuing imported capsule results.
CLI/TUI agents are instructed not to run nested resume commands inline in the active session.
When host terminal or GUI control is uncertain, the skill asks for user input or prints an exact local resume command instead of guessing.
Codex target verification guidance favors narrow checks such as session_index.jsonl, exact session files, or specific resume processes over broad CODEX_HOME scans.
security_implications: The guidance discourages broad recursive scans of CODEX_HOME because local histories can be large and may contain sensitive capsule URLs.
migration_notes: No runtime or data migration required; documentation-only skill guidance backfill.
